query:
INSERT INTO citizenDelegates (userId, ministryId, delegateId, delegateUserId, votingMethod, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  FLOOR(RAND() * 100) + 1 as userId,
  m.id as ministryId,
  CASE 
    WHEN RAND() < 0.6 THEN d.id
    ELSE NULL
  END as delegateId,
  CASE 
    WHEN RAND() < 0.2 THEN FLOOR(RAND() * 100) + 1
    ELSE NULL
  END as delegateUserId,
  CASE 
    WHEN RAND() < 0.6 THEN 'delegate'
    ELSE 'direct'
  END as votingMethod,
  NOW() as createdAt,
  NOW() as updatedAt
FROM ministries m
CROSS JOIN delegates d
WHERE d.ministryId = m.id AND d.isActive = true
LIMIT 300
